title: Extended Ores: All Dimensions
description: Extended Ores: All Dimensions adds new ores across the Overworld, Nether, and End
body:
# Extended Ores

Extended Ores adds new ores across the Overworld, Nether, and End, each with full tools, armor, blocks, trims, and progression.

## Extended Ores: Overworld

### Basic Metals
- **Tin**  
  Early-game metal with full gear and building blocks.

- **Nickel**  
  Mid early-game metal with stronger gear than tin.

- **Carbon**  
  Tough dark metal with full gear and smelting progression.

- **Rutile**  
  A stronger high-tier Overworld metal used in advanced progression.

- **Silver**  
  Bright utility metal with full tools, armor, and blocks.

- **Bismuth**  
  Rose-toned metal with full gear and storage blocks.

### Gems
- **Sapphire**  
  Blue gem ore with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Ruby**  
  Red gem ore with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Peridot**  
  Green gem ore with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Topaz**  
  Golden gem ore with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Onyx**  
  Dark gem ore with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

### Special Overworld Progression
- **Titanium**  
  Titanium is the top Overworld upgrade material.
  It is no longer mined directly from ore and is crafted through advanced progression.
  Full Titanium armor grants **Resistance**.

## Extended Ores: Nether

### Nether Metals
- **Emberite**  
  Fiery Nether metal with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Warpstone**  
  Green Nether metal with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

### Nether Gems
- **Gloomcrystal**  
  Purple Nether gem with full gear and trim support.

### Special Nether Progression
- **Blazite**  
  Endgame Nether upgrade material made from **Blazite Scrap**.
  Blazite uses a smithing upgrade path instead of normal crafting.
  Full Blazite armor grants **Resistance** and **Fire Resistance**.

## Extended Ores: End

### End Gems
- **Voidcrystal**  
  Black End gem with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Chorite**  
  Light-purple End gem with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

- **Orbitite**  
  Powerful yellow End gem with full tools, armor, trims, and blocks.

### Special End Armor Effect
- **Orbitite Full Set Effect**  
  While wearing a full Orbitite armor set, if you fall in the void, you will
  levite back onto the end island

## Extra Features
- Full armor trim support for vanilla trim templates
- Custom trim colors using the new ingots and gems
- Separate creative tabs for:
  - **Extended Ores: Overworld**
  - **Extended Ores: Nether**
  - **Extended Ores: End**

## Alloy Metals

- **Bronze**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Copper Ingot + Tin Ingot**

- **Rose Gold**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Gold Ingot + Copper Ingot**

- **Electrum**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Gold Ingot + Silver Ingot**

- **Steel**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Iron Ingot + Carbon Ingot**

- **Nickel Steel**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Iron Ingot + Nickel Ingot**

- **Bismuth Alloy**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Bismuth Ingot + Tin Ingot**

- **Nitinol**  
  Made in the Alloy Forge with **Nickel Ingot + Rutile Ingot**

All alloy metals include full gear, blocks, nuggets, trims, and horse armor.

## Alloy Forge Crafting Recipe

![Alloy Forge Recipe](https://www.image2url.com/r2/default/images/1776448475271-a4e92e4a-9643-4b4c-97e2-b3b450d62ffd.png)

## Enchantment Compatibility

All mod tools and wearable armor are fully integrated with vanilla enchanting.

- Enchanting tables use **lapis lazuli normally**
- More **bookshelves** unlock higher-level enchant options normally
- Mod swords get sword enchantments
- Mod mining tools get mining enchantments
- Mod armor gets the correct armor and slot-based enchantments
- Invalid enchantments are rejected just like vanilla

This means the mod’s gear works with **enchanting tables**, **anvils**, and **enchanted books** the same way vanilla equipment does.
